calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER URANIA GIANNAKARAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement is DENIED. This Court lacks jurisdiction to enforce the settlement. Sayta v. Chu (2017) 17 Cal.App.5th 960. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
